hero.subtitle: Centralize your purchases, invoices, and inventory. Let Procura's AI automate repetitive tasks and provide you with proactive strategic insights.

platform.subtitle: Replace your 5 current tools with a single platform. Procura intuitively connects your purchases, sales, and business intelligence.

ai.title: AI Copilot
ai.desc: Generate reports, ask questions about your data, and automate your workflows by chatting.

invoices.title: Smart Invoicing
invoices.desc: 1-click creation. Automatic reconciliation with purchase orders and payments.

ocr.title: OCR Extraction
ocr.desc: Never manually enter an invoice again. Our AI reads and extracts data from your PDFs instantly.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.desc: Real-time multi-warehouse tracking, threshold alerts, and automatic valuation.

purchasing.title: Purchasing & Expenses
purchasing.desc: Interactive purchase orders, approval workflows, and budget control.

suppliers.title: Supplier Portal
suppliers.desc: Collaborate directly with your partners. RFQs and document centralization.

analytics.title: Business Intelligence
analytics.desc: Dynamic dashboards. View your margins, expenses, and performance at a glance.

sync.title: Synchronized
sync.desc: Your quotes become orders, which become invoices, which update your stock. Automatically.

multi.title: Multi-Currency
multi.desc: Manage international operations with real-time conversion and exchange rate management.

pricing.title: A profitable investment
pricing.subtitle: Choose the right plan for your team's size and ambitions.
